voice_read.team_structure: TEAM (not solo) - captions use 'the team', 'the boys'

posts.caption: ⚡️ Thinking about going solar? Now's the time! ☀️ At Shocked Solar & Electrical, we supply and install premium solar systems designed to save you money and power your home smarter. From quality panels and inverters to battery storage and full home backup solutions — we've got you covered. ✅ Premium products only ✅ Quality workmanship ✅ 10 Year Installation Warranty ✅ Residential & Commercial Solar ✅ Battery Storage Solutions ✅ Honest advice & competitive pricing. Lower your power bills, increase energy independence and future-proof your home with a system built to last. 📞 Call us today for a FREE quote: 0490 482 632 📧 SHOCKEDSOLARELECTRICAL@GMAIL.COM. ⚡️ Local. Reliable. Professional. #SolarQueensland #SolarPower #SolarEnergy #SolarInstallation #batterystorage

Another quality commercial install completed by Shocked Solar & Electrical ⚡ We recently finished this 21kW solar installation in Mount Gravatt ☀️. 🔹 GoodWe 20kW 3-Phase Inverter. 🔹 TCL 440W High Efficiency Panels. Helping local businesses cut power bills and take control of rising energy costs 💰⚡ Thinking about solar for your home or business? Get in touch with the team at Shocked Solar & Electrical! 📞 0490 482 632 📩 SHOCKEDSOLARELECTRICAL@GMAIL.COM #ShockedSolarElectrical #CommercialSolar #MountGravatt #SolarQLD

Another premium install completed by Shocked Solar & Electrical 🔋☀️ This customer is now powered with: 🔹 50kWh SolaX battery storage 🔹 10kW SolaX inverter 🔹 13.3kW of LONGi Hi-MO X10 solar panels 🔹 Whole home backup – keeping the lights on when the grid goes down! ⚡️🏡 Less reliance on the grid, more energy independence, and serious savings for years to come 🙌

This shed is now running on an impressive 13.2kW solar system! More power, lower bills, and making the most of the Queensland sun 🌞🔋. Clean install, quality workmanship, and built to perform. Whether it's your shed, workshop, or home, we've got you covered. Why not go solar?
Why not go solar? ☀️ Installed by the team at Shocked Solar & Electrical ⚡ Quality systems, clean installs, real savings. DM us for a quote. #solar #pv #power #cleanenergy

Thinking about upgrading your kitchen appliances? ⚡️ From ovens and cooktops to lighting and power — we make sure everything's installed safely, cleanly, and built to handle the load. 📞 Give us a call: 0490 482 632. Powering your kitchen the right way. #Electrician #KitchenUpgrade #ApplianceInstall #SSE #PoweredRight

Wind rating requirements changed the game on this install 🌬️☀️ With screw lines too close together for a standard layout, the team had to rethink the system design. We switched it to a landscape configuration to meet compliance while keeping performance and strength where it needs to be. Adapting on site is all part of delivering a reliable solar system. #renuableenergy #solar #greenenergy #shocked #pv
Shocked Solar & Electrical offers Expert Installs, Quality Workmanship, and Clean Energy Solutions that power your future the right way ⚡️☀️ #GoGreenWithShocked

At Shocked Solar & Electrical, we make the process simple, stress-free, and tailored to your home or business. 🌱⚡️ ✔️ Quality products ✔️ Professional installations ✔️ Honest advice ✔️ Local experts you can trust. Make the smart switch today — your future self (and your wallet) will thank you. 🔋💡

☀️ The boys are headed up to North Queensland! Tackling a massive 100 kW solar install on a remote property — powered by Jinko panels, Schletter racking, Sigenergy inverters, and 96 kW of battery storage ⚡️🌴. Remote location, big energy — nothing we can't handle 💪 #SolarPower #NorthQueensland #RenewableEnergy #OffGrid #sse

posts.highlight: AC relocation + patio electrical fitout (Alan's job)
posts.caption: The boys had their work cut out at Alan's! It was necessary we relocated 2 split system air conditioners to make room for a monster fly over patio 🧐. Once built we roughed in and fit off the sandwich insulated patio, entertainment area and future kitchenette… This project turned out a treat 🤩. If you're looking to do something similar, get in contact with us…

Excluded 2 ad posts (DZHSiGvKDSv infographic, DX6gXyFCd6h kitchen-reno) + 1 in-carousel promo graphic (DYtoSH4Gue- slide 2, SolaX contact card). Photos->webp<=1080px; videos VP9/H264->H.264<=800px +faststart +poster; reel DYwL2LtqA1l reuses hero commercial-install.mp4. First 4 = showcase.
